Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration, Re: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Janet Brayer, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: 457 Pacific, LLC
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: Plaintiff 457 Pacific LLC's Motion For Reconsideration re: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment. RULING AFTER HEARING: Writ of Attachment is GRANTED $380,253. - undertaking set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Application And Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff 457 Pacific LLC's Application For Writ Of Attachment is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
